items.titolo: I mille miliardi di dollari di Musk risolverebbero la fame nel mondo
items.descrizione: I mille miliardi di dollari di Elon Musk basterebbero a risolvere la fame nel mondo e finanziare OpenAI fino al 2030. Un traguardo da record. The post I mille miliardi di dollari di Musk risolverebbero la fame nel mondo

items.titolo: Microsoft is reportedly testing Copilot+ AI features with discrete GPUs instead of NPUs — a feature available on Windows App SDK with a Windows Insider Experimental Channel build and Developer Mode turned on
items.descrizione: Microsoft is experimenting with Windows AI features on non-Copilot devices, finally allowing AI features to run on discrete GPUs. This move expands its user base and gives more users access to Windows 11 local AI capabil

items.titolo: US government warned Anthropic that Fable 5 had been jailbroken, but firm 'refused' to fix before US implemented export controls — Anthropic defended its decision by saying the jailbreak 'isn’t serious,' Chinese group ha
items.descrizione: David Sacks said the US government warned Anthropic that Claude Fable 5 had been jailbroken and that CEO Dario Amodei refused to fix the flaw.
